# Danki Coffee

> Premium 100% single-origin Arabica coffee beans, masterfully roasted in small batches in Dar es Salaam, Tanzania.

Founded by Catherine Kikkides, Danki Coffee (trading under Danki Investments) brings the highest quality East African highland beans directly to your cup. 

"it's not just coffee, it's love"

## Core Information
- **Company:** Danki Investments (trading as Danki Coffee)
- **Contact:** Catherine Kikkides
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +255 744 600042
- **Email:** info@dankicoffee.co.tz
- **Location:** Box 60332, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania
- **Instagram:** @dankicoffee
- **Payment Method:** M-Pesa (LIPA Number: 58223806)

## Pages & Navigation
- [Home](https://dankicoffee.co.tz/) - Redesigned homepage featuring our values, bestsellers, and community testimonials.
- [The Coffee Collection](https://dankicoffee.co.tz/shop.html) - Online shop offering Medium Roast, Medium-to-Dark Roast, and Dark Roast in 250g, 500g, and 1kg bags (Beans or ground).
- [Wholesale](https://dankicoffee.co.tz/wholesale.html) - Partnerships for cafes, offices, guest houses, and hotels. Custom wholesale order inquiries via direct WhatsApp.
- [Our Story](https://dankicoffee.co.tz/about.html) - Family heritage and our 4-step artisan process (Sourcing, Selecting, Roasting, Delivering).
- [Contact](https://dankicoffee.co.tz/contact.html) - Direct contact details, Lipa payment instructions, and frequently asked questions (FAQs).

## Brewing Recommendations
- **French Press:** Coarse grind, 60g/L ratio, 4 mins brew time.
- **Pour Over (V60):** Medium-Fine grind, 15g/250g ratio, 3 mins brew time.
- **Espresso:** Fine grind, 18g/36g extraction ratio, 28-32 secs extraction.
- **Moka Pot:** Medium grind, fill basket without packing, 5 mins brew time.
